name: bilig
description: Production spreadsheet engine monorepo with worker-first web app, custom reconciler, and AssemblyScript/WASM fast path.

scripts.format: oxfmt --write .oxlintrc.json package.json playwright.config.ts tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts vitest.workspace.ts apps packages e2e scripts
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check .oxlintrc.json package.json playwright.config.ts tsconfig.base.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts vitest.workspace.ts apps packages e2e scripts
scripts.analyze:dead-code: knip -c knip.config.ts --workspace apps/bilig --workspace apps/web --workspace packages/agent-api --workspace packages/core --workspace packages/formula --workspace packages/grid --workspace packages/runtime-kernel --workspace packages/worker-transport --include files,dependencies --no-config-hints --no-progress
scripts.analyze:cycles: depcruise --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs apps/bilig/src apps/web/src packages/agent-api/src packages/core/src packages/formula/src packages/grid/src packages/runtime-kernel/src packages/worker-transport/src
scripts.analyze:quality: pnpm analyze:dead-code && pnpm analyze:exports && pnpm analyze:cycles
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @bilig/protocol build && pnpm --filter @bilig/workbook-domain build && pnpm --filter @bilig/binary-protocol build && pnpm --filter @bilig/agent-api build && pnpm --filter @bilig/contracts build && pnpm --filter @bilig/runtime-kernel build && pnpm --filter @bilig/actors build && pnpm --filter @bilig/formula build && pnpm --filter @bilig/storage-browser build && pnpm --filter @bilig/storage-server build && pnpm --filter @bilig/excel-fixtures build && pnpm --filter @bilig/excel-import build && pnpm --filter @bilig/wasm-kernel build && pnpm --filter @bilig/core build && pnpm --filter @bilig/worker-transport build && pnpm --filter @bilig/renderer build && pnpm --filter @bilig/grid build && pnpm --filter @bilig/benchmarks build && pnpm --filter @bilig/zero-sync build && pnpm --filter @bilig/app build && pnpm --filter @bilig/web build
scripts.test:browser:prod: pnpm exec playwright test -c playwright.prod.config.ts e2e/tests/prod-smoke.pw.ts
scripts.test:correctness:fast: pnpm analyze:quality && pnpm test:correctness:core && pnpm test:correctness:formula && pnpm test:correctness:server
scripts.publish:check: bun scripts/clean-package-builds.ts && pnpm build && bun scripts/check-package-publish.ts
scripts.ci: pnpm protocol:check && pnpm formula-inventory:check && pnpm workspace-resolution:check && pnpm naming:check && pnpm lint && pnpm wasm:build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm exec playwright install chromium && pnpm test:fuzz:main && pnpm coverage && bun scripts/coverage-contracts.ts && pnpm bench:smoke && CI=1 pnpm bench:contracts && pnpm test:browser && pnpm --filter @bilig/web build && pnpm release:check && git diff --exit-code && git diff --cached --exit-code
